Cafe Menu — SWEET HUT BAKERY & CAFE
Cafe Menu
EXPLORE OUR
TOPPING MENU
Milk Tea
Sweet Hut Milk Tea
Our famous, classic black milk tea is created from an eclectic mix of Assam and Earl Grey. Lightly sweetened and mixed with boba.
Jasmine Green Milk Tea
Green tea scented with jasmine blossoms is made creamy, with its sweetness scaled back a touch to let the fragrance peek through.
Hazelnut Milk Tea
A blend of black milk tea and hazelnut syrup, our hazelnut version offers a mildly nutty flavor.
Caramel Milk Tea
Our caramel milk tea is a mixture of black milk tea with Caramel flavor
Strawberry Milk Tea
Strawberry milk tea captures the eye with its bright pink hue, and is a kid favorite for just that reason. Plus, no caffeine!
Taro Milk Tea
Our go-to non-caffeinated drink, taro is a lightly sweet and creamy drink, tinged naturally purple!
Honey Jasmine Green Milk Tea
A slightly sweeter version of our Jasmine milk tea, Honey Jasmine is a creamy version of our green tea that's been mixed with honey.
Cream brulee Milk Tea
Our made-from-scratch brown sugar caramel mixed with whole milk. This drink is highly recommended with our honey boba! Warning: highly seductive!.
Thai Iced Tea
Thai Iced Tea is an orange drink composed of strongly brewed sweet Thai tea and half-and-half.
Coffee Milk Tea
Coffee Milk Tea is a customer's favorite, a mixture of our House blended coffee and classic Sweet Hut milk tea.
Hong Kong Milk Tea
A cousin of Sweet Hut milk tea, Hong Kong black milk tea is less sweet and lends a stronger tea taste than its relative, and is made with brewed Ceylon, evaporated milk, and condensed milk.
Peppermint Milk Tea
With a slight flavor kick, this peppermint milk tea has a refreshing taste compared to the traditional milk tea.
Grass Jelly Milk Tea
We mix equal parts grass jelly and our Sweet Hut milk tea for a perfect balance of drink and texture.
Grass Jelly with Soy Milk
For our dairy-free, caffeine-free customers, we present the soy milk-based drink, filled halfway up with grass jelly. We'll make it as sweet as you'd like!
Summer Breeze
Mango Green/black Tea
Our pure green/black tea is flavored with mango extract! A popular option, especially in the summer time. Recommended toppings: aloe vera and lychee jellies.
Passion Fruit Green/black Tea
For an exotic take on our original green/black tea, we've added passion fruit extract.
Honey Green/black Tea
Green/black tea mixed with nothing but honey, both of which provide significant health benefits. Our suggestion: sip it down with honey boba and lychee jelly!
Green tea/Black Tea
Jasmine green tea is a healthy drink with great source of antioxidant and energizing caffeine/Assam blended black tea leaves given a full-bodied flavor profile!
Lychee green/Black Tea
Our chilled green/black tea gets mixed with lychee flavor; we recommend adding lychee jellies for maximum lychee flavor!
LEMON green/Black Tea
Chilled green/black tea with freshly squeezed lemons!
Fresh Orange Green/Black Tea
Green or black tea is lightly sweetened with fresh orange squeezed in, made to order.
Peppermint Green Tea
Peppermint extract adorns green tea for a refreshing, minty drink. Fresh mint leaves for extra pizzazz.
Fruit Slush
Strawberry Slush
The go-to choice for kids, the strawberry slush is sweet and fruity, the simplest frosty drink.
Strawberry Banana Slush
Compared to the strawberry slush, our strawberry banana is made a bit creamier by the banana.
Four Berries Slush
A slush blended with blackberries, blueberries, strawberries, and raspberries, berry luscious!
Mango Slush
Our most popular fruit slush, the mango slush is bright orange and frosty. This is a brain freeze experience you'll most likely enjoy.
Watermelon Slush
A summertime favorite, our watermelon slush is made of freshly sliced watermelon, ice, and a touch of sugar. Made to order.
Pineapple Paradise Slush
A tangy, icy treat that's equally as bright as the sun, ours is loaded with pineapple goodness.
lychee Slush
Caffeine free. Sweet and refreshing, this lychee slush will help you stay cool and embrace summer, one sip at a time.
Avocado Slush
A close contender with our watermelon slush, the avocado slush is a unique twist on a typically savory fruit, blended when ripest with sweetened condensed milk, fresh milk, and ice!
FRAPPE
Matcha Frappe
Powdered green tea is blended with milk and sugar until cold and creamy, an Asian take on the classic American frappe!
Taro Frappe
A frozen, blended version of our customer-favorite taro milk tea! You'll find the same unique purple color.
Mocha Frappe
Our classic blended beverage consists of a chocolate and espresso flavor!
White Chocolate Frappe
A creamy, dreamy blended drink flavored with white chocolate, with the option to embellish it with a fruity flavor of your choice!
Extreme Toffee Cocoa frappe
Our chocolately blended conconction is like a mocha frappe on steroids, with the chocolately-ness amped up. Satisfy your sweet tooth.
Hazelnut Frappe
A frozen take on our hazelnut milk tea is a nutty, blended beverage.
Caramel de Leche Frappe
Our caramel de leche frappe is a concept loosely based on caramelized sugar.
Coconut Frappe
A creamy coconut frappe is our version of drinking iced coconut milk.
Energetic Healthy Boost
Brown Sugar Ginger Root Tea
Strong ginger syrup is flavored with brown sugar and created to not only clear your sinuses, but cleanse your palate with its spicy kick.
Honey Lemon Aloe
Our Asian version of lemonade is made purely with lemon juice and honey. Ours comes with aloe at the bottom, proven to be the perfect combination. Feel free to change it up!
Kumquat Lemon Juice
An authentic sweet-n-sour drink is made from dried plums, kumquat preserves, and lemon juice.
Honey Ginseng Tea
We sweeten ginseng tea with a touch of honey, a miracle drink of health benefits. Best when served hot, this drink has a perfumey scent that is easily detected.
Oriental Tea POP
Pomegranate Oolong Tea
Infused with pomegranate notes, this Pomegranate Oolong Tea is bursting with fruit flavors and bright floral notes.
Japanese Sencha Tea
Our Japanese Sencha Tea is a nourishing green tea blend hand picked in the spring for a delicate and clean taste.
Dragon Pearl Jasmine tea
This light tea is loaded with delicious jasmine scented pearls for a captivating and delicious taste.
Decaf Ceylon tea
This decaffeinated Ceylon Tea is a smooth classic black tea from Ceylon.
Earl Grey tea
A blend of four black teas, Silvertips, and bergamot, this Early Grey Tea is relaxing with its elegant flavors.
Darjeeling Tea
A mellow and light flavored black tea with a light color and a fragrant "nose".
Coffee Selection
House Coffee
Our house coffee is a the Intelligentsia El Diablo Dark Roast Blend that celebrates the savory side of coffee and pairs well with caramel and chocolate flavors. It emphasizes these flavors and creates a satisfying, smooth finish.
sweet hut ICE Coffee
Our house blended coffee is made fresh daily. Ask for our pre-blended version made with non-dairy creamer and sweetener, or hot black coffee. We also do iced black coffee!
Americano
Enjoy the taste of Instelligentsia coffee with this shot of espresso mixed with hot water.
Sea Salt Latte
A year-round staple, ours comes both steamed and iced, topped with unique sea salt whipped cream.
Classic Hazelnut Latte
Espresso tinged with nutty tones, topped with steamed milk.
Caramel macchiato
A shot of espresso layered with steamed milk with a caramel drizzle to top it off.
classic Vanilla Latte
A shot of espresso mixed with milk and vanilla flavor.
White Chocolate Mocha
White chocolate makes this mocha drink slightly sweeter than the original version, just the way we like it.
Vietnamese Coffee
Cà phê sữa đá translates literally into "ice coffee," and is highly requested by regulars. A shot of espresso mixed with sweetened condensed milk and then poured over ice, this one will give you a delightful energy boost!
Matcha Latte
A non-conventional caffeine boost, this creamy latte is made with matcha powder, which is believed to offer more health benefits than plain green tea.
Chai Tea
With a spiced tea flavor, our Chai Tea Latte is our caffeine-free option for those who enjoy the traditional latte without the coffee.
Mocha
Mocha is a chocolate variant of the Classic Latte!
cappucino
A traditional coffee drink with Intelligentsia espresso topped with steamed milk foam!
hot chocolate
A Sweet Hut rich chocolate drink, lightly sweetened with condensed milk!
